title: TrimCrafts
description: A Minecraft 1.21+ plugin that gives each armor trim two unique combat abilities, activated by Shift+clicking. Wear a full matching trimmed armor set to unlock them. 18 trims, 36 abilities total, all configurable in a single config file.
body:
TrimCraft

Armor Trims.

Every armor trim in Minecraft 1.21 hides a secret. TrimCraft unlocks it.

Equip a full matching set of trimmed armor and gain access to two powerful, unique abilities — each one tied to the soul of that trim's material. Activate them instantly in combat with simple Shift keybinds, watch the cooldown tick away above your XP bar, and feel the world shift around you.

18 armor trims. 36 unique abilities.

Features

Shift + Left Click / Shift + Right Click

Each trim grants two distinct abilities — one per keybind. Fast, responsive, no command menus.

Cooldown Display

A live progress bar above the XP bar shows exactly how long until your next ability is ready.

Full Configurability

Every cooldown, damage value, radius, duration, and multiplier lives in config.yml. Tweak everything without touching a line of code.

Permission System

Grant or restrict abilities per-trim using simple per-node permissions.

Particle Effects

Every ability fires custom particles so players always know when power is being used.

All 18 Trims

Silence — Drain life from a nearby player. Strip their senses entirely.

Wild — Channel the jungle's healing energy. Unleash primal rage.

Coast — Crash a tidal wave into your enemies. Encase yourself in ocean armor.

Dune — Blind and slow with a sandstorm. Vanish into desert mirages.

Eye — See all enemies through walls. Curse a target with an unbreakable glow.

Host — Yank a player toward you with spectral chains. Regenerate with undying spirit.

Raiser — Summon undead warriors from the earth. Brand enemies with a death mark.

Rib — Trap enemies in a phantom bone cage. Reinforce yourself with nether fortitude.

Sentry — Become an iron fortress with massive damage reduction. Execute low-health targets instantly.

Shaper — Warp through space in your facing direction. Crush enemies with inverted gravity.

Snout — Charge through enemies with brute force. Rally allies with a piglin war cry.

Spire — Launch nether lances that set enemies ablaze. Wear living fire as a shield.

Tide — Unleash a devastating tsunami. Transform into an abyssal deep-sea form.

Vex — Dash three times with brief invincibility. Strike with a blade that ignores all armor.

Ward — Reflect 75% of incoming damage back at attackers. Consecrate a zone of healing for allies.

Wayfinder — Phase through thin walls instantly. Curse a target with total dimensional disorientation.

Bolt — Call down a targeted lightning strike. Electrify your armor to shock attackers.

Flow — Slow all enemies while you accelerate. Freeze your state and rewind three seconds into the past.

Commands

/triminfo — View your active trim's abilities and cooldowns

/trimcraft list — List all available trims

/trimcraft info (trim) — Full details on any trim

/trimcraft reload — Reload the config live

Requirements

Paper or Spigot — Minecraft 1.21 through 1.21.4 — Java 17 or newer — No external dependencies

Abilities only activate when wearing a complete set of four matching trimmed armor pieces.

Changelog

v2.0.0 — Initial Beta Release

  • Added all 18 armor trim ability sets (36 abilities total)
  • Added Rib trim: Bone Cage and Nether Fortitude
  • Cooldown display above XP bar with live progress bar
  • Full config.yml with per-trim toggles, cooldowns, damage, and range values
  • Per-trim permission nodes
  • Particle effects on all abilities
  • Commands: /triminfo, /trimcraft list, /trimcraft info, /trimcraft reload
